description: 30-minute poll (Tier P1 - Pipeline / 7 streams). Pulls data-pipeline integration health: MDE_DataExportSettings_CL, MDE_ConnectedApps_CL, MDE_TenantContext_CL, MDE_TenantWorkloadStatus_CL, MDE_StreamingApiConfig_CL, MDE_IntuneConnection_CL, MDE_PurviewSharing_CL. Tier P1 = pipeline integration (mid-frequency).
